case_title: SRAMEK, LYDIA et al vs. FLENOY, DELORES B.

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF SRAMEK, LYDIA SRAMEK, MILAN AS TO DEFENDANT FLENOY, DELORES B.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT FLENOY, DELORES B.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT FLENOY, DELORES B. JUDGMENT ON CORRECTED ARBITRATION AWARD IN FAVOR OF DELORES B. FLENOY & AGAINST MILAN SRAMEK & LYDIA SRAMEK FOR THE SUM OF $3975.00 AS DAMAGES; $500.00 AS ARBITRATION FEES PLUS INTEREST, COSTS & ATTY'S FEES.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, FILED BY DEFENDANT FLENOY, DELORES B. AS TO PLAINTIFF SRAMEK, LYDIA SRAMEK, MILAN
OPPOSITION PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY DEFENDANT FLENOY, DELORES B.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION (PETITION) TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1995 CONSIDERING THE PAPERS & ARGUMENTS, THE PETITION TO VACATE THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED. THE COURT CONCURRING WITH THE OPPOSITION. (SEE MINUTE ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS OF TH E RULING).
